description: Draft trait catalog for the future GUI. Unknown values are null and must be verified before the GUI treats them as selectable.

sources.name: Current GBFRSigilEditor Program.cs
sources.notes: Contains currently hardcoded trait hashes and write-time target levels.

sources.name: Nenkai Relink Trait/Skill IDs
sources.notes: Public trait/skill ID mapping used during prior verification.

sources.name: Observed save data
sources.notes: Existing and generated saves confirmed 1701 stores trait hashes and 1702 stores displayed trait levels.
